r 5'5'

md60—DIN-su—⸢E⸣ lu₂UMBISAG DUMU ša₂ mni-din-tu₂—d60 UNUGki iti[...]

Anu-balassu-iqbi, the scribe, son of Nidintu-Anu. At Uruk, month [...]

r 6'6'

U₄ 7-KAM₂ MU 9-KAM₂ msi-lu-ku LUGAL

7th day, 9th year, Seleucus the king.
